text: Practice reminder: Strikers train Monday and Wednesday 4:30-6:00pm at Corcoran Fields. Bring shin guards, mouthguard, water, and both a light and dark pinnie.
GAME DAY: Fall-league semifinal is Saturday, Oct 3 at 10:00am. Arrive at Corcoran by 9:00am for warmups. Wear home whites; bring your away kit as backup.
Uniform & gear: check your stick tape and replace worn grips this week. Order any missing socks/spirit gear through the team store link pinned in Logistics.
Carpool sign-up for the Oct 3 semifinal is open — add your name to the sheet in Logistics. Parents, let Coach Maya know if you can drive.
